prompt: Edit image 1: Overlay the 'Xbox Social' floating window panel from image 2 onto the right side of the main interface window in image 1, integrating its modern UI style naturally.

The overlaid panel should seamlessly integrate, adopting the modern UI style of the 'Xbox Social' panel, characterized by its dark theme, subtle transparency, and rounded corners.
